metaTitle: How MyHome24App works – find properties easily
metaDescription: Learn step by step how MyHome24App helps you search, compare, and contact people for properties across Germany.
title: How does MyHome24App work?
intro: From the first search to getting in touch: discover how MyHome24App helps you find, compare, and evaluate properties in Germany more efficiently.

heroStats.title: Search
heroStats.text: Filter by city, price, and property type.

heroStats.title: Compare
heroStats.text: Save favorites and review listings side by side.

heroStats.title: Contact
heroStats.text: Get in touch directly with owners or agents.

quickOverview.title: Discover properties
quickOverview.text: Buy or rent with a modern map view and smart search.

quickOverview.title: Find agents
quickOverview.text: Discover the right contacts for your region.

quickOverview.title: More transparency
quickOverview.text: Compare prices, sizes, and important details at a glance.

stepsIntro: This is how the platform is typically used — simple, clear, and designed for a modern real estate search experience.

steps.title: Browse properties by city, ZIP code, or category
steps.text: Use search, filters, and the map view to find matching properties in your preferred area more quickly.

steps.title: Save favorites and stay organized
steps.text: Keep interesting listings, compare offers, and manage your selection in one place.

steps.title: Contact owners or agents directly
steps.text: Send quick inquiries through the platform and ask specific questions about location, price, or features.

steps.title: Publish your listing in just a few steps
steps.text: Owners and agents can create their own listings and present their properties visibly on the platform.

benefits: You save time with a clearly structured search experience.
You can compare listings, prices, and sizes much faster.
You can filter more precisely by region, type, and purpose.
You get a simpler way to contact owners or agents.
tipText: Start with the map view and save promising listings to your favorites. This makes it much easier to stay organized, especially when there are many results.
tipHint: Especially helpful when searching in larger cities or across several neighborhoods.

bottomCta.title: Ready to start your property search?
bottomCta.text: Start now with buying, renting, or finding the right agents on MyHome24App.
